name: Polperro
address: 150 Red Hill Rd, Red Hill South VIC 3937
signature: Small-production cool-climate pinot and chardonnay poured in one of the prettiest tasting rooms on the ridge
editorNote:
Polperro feels smaller and more intimate than some of the region's trophy estates, which is exactly its appeal. The cellar door is tucked into the vines with a line of sight over the ridge, the pours are thoughtful, and the whole place carries the tone of a producer that cares more about the wine than the performance around it.

The Pennon Hill labels are often the sweet spot if you want quality without chasing the top tier. Pair a tasting with lunch and you have one of the gentlest half-days in Red Hill South.

Go midweek if you can. The room rewards quiet.

visiting.tastingNote: Walk-in only, maximum 6 guests, no bookings required for cellar door. Tasting includes Polperro and Even Keel wines. Restaurant requires separate booking.

restaurant.name: Polperro Restaurant
restaurant.description: 1 Hat in the Age Good Food Guide 2024 and 2025. Modern Australian cuisine connected to the estate's organic ethos.

accommodation.name: Polperro Vineyard Villas
accommodation.description: Luxury on-site villas nestled among the vines. Full stay-and-taste proposition for a Peninsula weekend.

editorVerdict: Polperro earns its reputation quietly. Sam Coverdale's winemaking is unhurried and honest, and the organic/biodynamic certification (since 2019) is matched by a level of single-vineyard discipline that few estates sustain. The Red Hill property brings a restaurant with a hat and accommodation in the vines — one of the Peninsula's most complete stay-and-taste propositions.

faq.q: Does Polperro take walk-ins or do you need to book?
faq.a: The cellar door is walk-in only (maximum 6 guests), no bookings required. Open Wednesday to Sunday, 11am–5pm. The restaurant requires a separate booking.
Yes. Polperro Restaurant holds 1 Hat in The Age Good Food Guide 2024 and 2025. Modern Australian cuisine.
No. Free-range chickens and other farm animals are on the property.

heroImage.alt: Polperro's coastal heritage — the mooring at Sorrento pier, tied to the Polperro winery's Peninsula identity
